dc_description: A narrow urban street in a hilly old town is bordered by stone and plaster buildings. On the left, a large wall mural depicts dark bird-like figures, one holding a blue staff, beneath a terrace railing and greenery. Several cars are parked in angled spaces along the wall. The road curves uphill to the right past a red building and older stone facades. A dense green tree canopy fills the right side, partly obscuring a blue circular traffic sign, and a bicycle is parked near a stone wall. Bright sunlight creates strong shadows across the street under a clear blue sky.
novel_visual_observations: The central stone building has small shuttered windows and a white satellite dish mounted near arched openings.
Two old-fashioned curved streetlamps are visible along the street, one near the mural and one farther uphill.
rich_context: Osteria Pensa per Te, 13, Viale Regina Elena, Formello, Roma Capitale, Lazio, Italia
